Ad Text:
Immediate Start: Control Systems Engineer – Local in MT Isa
The perfect opportunity to get into mining and kick off your career. We’re looking for a skilled Control Systems site-based secondment, to be involved in a major Automation end of life expansion contract.

🗓️ Roster - Local Monday to Friday 5/2 10 hours per day
📍 MT Isa
💰 $70–$90/h + super
📅 Immediate start – Long term potential for extension




ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a site-based secondment in Mount Isa, ideal for an engineer looking to broaden their experience and gain real world exposure to mining operations.

You’ll work closely with site electrical and maintenance teams to:

Develop and deliver work packs across surface and underground infrastructure as related to PLC upgrades.

Ensure designs align with Site Standards and long-term operational needs.

Gain a deep understanding of the mining process and how equipment operates in practice.

 

You’ll also have the opportunity to:

Take on meaningful ownership of projects.

Work alongside both CAPITAL PFS AUSTRALIA Automation and Site based teams.

Transition into an ongoing Brisbane or site-based role following the secondment.




What you’ll be doing:

Troubleshooting and improving control and automation systems in a live environment.

Programming and configuring PLCs, Gateways, HMIs, SCADA, and Instrumentation / Drives.

Supporting operations and maintenance teams to keep plant running efficiently.

Identifying and implementing improvements to performance and reliability.




What you’ll be exposed to and experience requirements:

2 - 5 year's experience in a similar role

Allen Bradley PLC platforms (SLC, MicroLogix, CompactLogix, ControlLogix).

Industrial communication networks (DeviceNet, DHRIO, Ethernet/IP, Modbus).

SCADA packages AVEVA System Platform and AVEVA PlantSCADA CitectSCADA.

Allen Bradley PanelView HMIs and protocol gateways (e.g. Red Lion).

Virtualisation environments such as VMWare ESXi.

Large-scale industrial networks (Stratix, RuggedCom, Moxa, Cambium).

Cyber Security Standards IEC62443 and the application there of.

 

Why this Role?

Gain valuable site experience in an operational mine environment.

Be part of a high value flagship upgrade.

Gain exposure to legacy systems, implement new ones, and integrate functionality between them to ensure safe and reliable operation throughout the upgrade process.

Work with experienced senior engineers to fast track your knowledge and experience.

Clear pathway into a long-term role with CAPITAL PFS AUSTRALIA Automation post-secondment.

Australian Work Rights - Birth Certificate, Passport and/or valid Visa.

BENEFITS

A very competitive remuneration package and weekly pays

Additional further opportunities within CPFS_AUS

Superannuation paid on all hours worked

Staff Uniforms

Technical Support and ongoing development opportunities

Ongoing opportunities within CAPITAL PFS AUSTRALIA

Excellent safety & team culture
